titleStmt.title: SII 17.730: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 730. (A.R. No. 673 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine, in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This records the grant of lands in Mudalaimēḍu alias Parakēsarinallūr in Vaḍa-Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam and made tax-free by the king at the instance of Vāṇādarāyaṉ as dēvadāna and maḍappuṟa-iṛaiyili to the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiyār and to the Tribhuvanavīran-maṭha founded at the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam by Tapasya Kāśyapaṉ, a Śivabrāhmaṉa of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrītribhuvanaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 39 nāḷ 10 ṉāl koṉeriṉmaik[oṇṭāṉ ja]yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu kānappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyiluṭaiyār koyiṟ patipāta mulappaṭṭuṭai pañcā cāriyaṉ tevakaṉmi māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku cikāriyañ ceyvāṉukku It tevaṟku veṇṭu nivantaṅka
ḷukku yiṟuppatāka vaṭapaiyyūr koṭṭattu Araicūr nilaikkiḻ mutalaimeṭāna parakecarinallūr naṉcai viḷainilattile nilam 7 10 2nta veliyum punce viḷai nilattile nilam 100 10 3 3� veliyum Ittevar tevatāna yiṟaiyiliyākavum Ikkoyilil civadvijan tapasyakāśya paṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa nampi Ik koyilil tirumaṭai viḷākattil Eṭutta tiripuvana viran maṭattup
paricārakaṟkum maṭattukku veṇṭuvanattukku Ivvūril kaṇṭamaṭaṅka naṉcey viḷai nilam 10 veliyum puṉcey viḷai nilam5 veliyum maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyākavum Ivvūr nattamum cāttappaṉ cerinattamum vaṭukaccāttu nattamum nilam 3va ca4 Uḷḷur mādevar cikoyilum tirunantavana nilam 2pa tuṟkai cikoyil nilam makiḻn=tapa viṟṟiruntāḻvār cikoyilum
tirunantavaṉamum nilam tma�kiḻ � 2pa Ivūr kurukkattip pūṇṭi natta nilam2pa m makātevar cikoyilun tirunantavana nilam pa Eriyāl nilam pa 9tama � kiḻ vaṅa piṭāriputteri Ammai koyilum tirunantavaṉa nilam � kiḻ �2pa keraḷāntakacaturveti maṅkalattu nīr pāyum Āṟṟukālāl nilam 1� ciṟukāṭum karampu nilam 10 6vam ciṟukuḷam 2 10 7
ṉāl nilam 7ipa � kiḻ � 2pa �m Oṭaikaḷāl 5 �m pavaḷam pampuratteri kovai � 2 m teṟkil tāṅkalāl nilam 2 3pa Ūr Erikarai nir kovai nilam 5 10 � m Atti Aṇṇaṉ Eri nilam 3ipam cuṭukāṭu nilam 3pam Āka nilam 3 100 4vapakma Itil Uḷḷūr tevarkaḷ cikoyilum tirunanta ḻivu Iṭṭa nilamuḷpaṭa Ūraṭaṅ kalum tevatānayiṟaiyiliyākavum maṭappuṟa
yiṟaiyiliyākavum Antarāyam pāṭṭam ponnāyam nellāya muḷpaṭa yiṟaiyili peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu yikkoyil civadvijan tapasyakāśyapaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa nampiyaik kāṭṭi vāṇā tarāyan namakku coṉnamaiyil yippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac colli taṉak
vaṟku tevatāna yiṟaiyiliyākavum maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyākavum kaikkoṇṭu nivantañ celuttap paṇṇuka Eḻutināṉ tirumantira Olai Irācanārāyaṇa muventaveḷāṉ tiruvāy malarn taruḷinapaṭikku Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻiñcattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaya
cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ..ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu 2 Uḷvarikku Eḻuttiṭṭār puravuvarik kūṟṟukku Ivai vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu 2 puravuvari pottaka nāyakam Ivai ciṟṟāmuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai centamaṅkalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai putuvūru
Digital edition of SII 17.730 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
